hook.summary: Cows in UFOs fly across the screen while player scores rapidly increase.
hook.visual_action: Animated cows in flying saucers move horizontally across a bright, colorful background with escalating coin counters.
hook.text_overlay: 88 FORTUNES SLOTS, INVADERS ATTACK AGAIN FROM PLANET MOOLAH, PLAY NOW!

scene_flow: Introduction of the Planet Moolah theme with cows in UFOs and character scoreboards.
Rapidly increasing coin counts for four different characters to simulate winning momentum.
Continuous movement of UFOs and pulsing CTA button to maintain visual engagement.
on_screen_text: INVADERS ATTACK AGAIN FROM PLANET MOOLAH
audience_proxy: Adults 35+ who enjoy casual social casino games with humorous or quirky themes.
